title: The Shadow Knows
script:
[TITLE: The Shadow Knows]
[CHARACTERS: Shadow, Sunny, Melody]

[HOST_INTRO]
MELODY: So, Sunny lost their math homework. And Shadow... well, you'll see. This is one of those conversations that just gets weirder. Ready?
[/HOST_INTRO]

[THE_CONVERSATION]
SUNNY: My homework is gone! Completely gone!
SHADOW: According to my calculations... hmm. That is statistically improbable.
SUNNY: Unless... it was eaten.
SHADOW: By whom?
SUNNY: By your shadow! It’s always hungry at night!
[SFX: tiny_squeak]
SHADOW: That is not a recognized digestive process.
SUNNY: But shadows *do* eat things! Like light! And socks!
SHADOW: Socks are not scientifically proven to be consumed by shadows.
SUNNY: Then explain my missing left sock from Tuesday!
[PAUSE: 400]
SHADOW: ...I may have misplaced it during a dimensional experiment.
SUNNY: Aha! So you *do* eat things!
SHADOW: That was an accident. A *regrettable* accident.
SUNNY: Then you won’t mind if we check your stomach!
[SFX: gentle_rumble]
SHADOW: That is not how shadows work.
SUNNY: But if you *did* eat it, we could get it back!
SHADOW: How?
SUNNY: Jumping jacks! Pickle juice! A squirrel to shake you!
[SFX: slide_whistle_up]
SHADOW: I refuse to be shaken by a rodent.
SUNNY: Then admit you ate it!
SHADOW: ...Fine. I may have *temporarily* stored it.
SUNNY: Where?!
SHADOW: In my *shadow dimension stomach*.
[SFX: soft_pop]
MELODY: [BREAK] Oh no. No no no.
SUNNY: That’s amazing! Can we visit?!
SHADOW: Only if you bring a flashlight. And a snack.
[SFX: gentle_crash]
SUNNY: This is fine! This is completely fine!
[/THE_CONVERSATION]

[THE_END]
MELODY: And that’s why you should never let Shadow babysit your homework. Goodnight.
[/THE_END]
host_intro: So, Sunny lost their math homework. And Shadow... well, you'll see. This is one of those conversations that just gets weirder. Ready?
host_outro: And that’s why you should never let Shadow babysit your homework. Goodnight.
